mano_cua.result_summary: 文档网站找到useGlobalEvent和useEvent两个事件hook，支持passive选项（展示了passive:true示例），但页面仅提供静态只读代码和预构建演示组件，无可编辑代码编辑器/沙盒，无法在浏览器内测试passive:false+preventDefault()场景。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Documentation site only shows static code examples and pre-built interactive demos with fixed functionality. No code editor/playground available to test passive:false with change event and preventDefault().
